# GitHub Profile README

This is the source for the [Portfolio README](https://github.com/CocoaKova/Portfolio).

## Auto-generate stats

This repo can be used as a GitHub Profile README. To update it:

1. Edit `README.md` directly
2. Commit and push to `main`
3. The profile README will update automatically via the `README.md` content

## Contributing

This is a personal showcase. Not accepting PRs unless they're from the future or from myself 2 hours ago.
